name: UniProtProteinSkill
description: Query UniProt public REST API for protein and gene information, then summarize the result for cell omics questions.

tools.name: search_protein
tools.description: Search reviewed human UniProtKB entries by gene name, protein name, or accession.

input_schema.query: protein name, gene symbol, or accession

tools.name: get_protein
tools.description: Fetch one UniProtKB entry by accession.

tools.name: explain_protein_for_context
tools.description: Search a protein and return a compact explanation tailored to a biological question.
